title: Bomb squad called to Scottish military base after 'suspicious package' found

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Bomb squad called to Scottish military base after 'suspicious package' found. A 200m cordon was put in place around RAF Lossiemouth on Thursday afternoon, with civilians asked to avoid the area.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb squad called to Scottish military base after 'suspicious package' found
